title: Minecraft Bedrock NPC Dialogue 1.14.0
description: An NPC dialogue definition document for a behavior pack.

npc_dialogue_definition.title: NPC Dialogue Definition
npc_dialogue_definition.description: The NPC dialogue definition containing scenes.

scenes.description: Array of dialogue scene definitions. Each scene has a scene_tag, optional text, npc_name, buttons, and commands.

dialogue_scene.title: Dialogue Scene
dialogue_scene.description: A single NPC dialogue scene definition.

scene_tag.description: The name used to call this scene in-game.

oneOf.description: The name displayed for the NPC in the dialogue box.

npc_name.description: Optional. Add or change a name for your NPC dialogue box.

oneOf.description: The dialogue text displayed in the NPC dialogue box.

text.description: Optional. The dialogue text displayed in the NPC dialogue box.

on_open_commands.description: Optional. The commands that will fire when the NPC dialogue box opens.

on_close_commands.description: Optional. The commands that will fire when the NPC dialogue box closes.

buttons.description: Optional. Array of buttons for the NPC dialogue.

dialogue_button.title: Dialogue Button
dialogue_button.description: A button in the NPC dialogue.

name.description: The text displayed on the button.

commands.description: The commands to execute when the button is pressed.
